fields.description: Default company for Accommodation Ledger, Maintenance, Utility, and Lease documents. Required before enabling financial posting.
fields.label: Company

fields.description: Operational currency for Habitat cost fields. Fetched from Company if left blank.
fields.label: Default Currency

fields.description: Default mode keeps all custody and depreciation inside Habitat with no financial posting.
fields.label: Custody Integration Mode
fields.options:
Habitat Internal / No Financial Posting
ERPNext Asset Integration
ERPNext Stock Integration

fields.description: When OFF (default), accommodation assignment does not touch Salary Structure Assignment.
fields.label: Enable Housing Allowance Deduction

fields.description: When ON, checkout damage amounts post to Additional Salary. Default OFF.
fields.label: Enable Damage Deduction Posting

fields.description: Salary Component (Deduction type) used when posting custody damage as Additional Salary. Must exist in HRMS before enabling.
fields.label: Damage Deduction Component

fields.description: When OFF, Accommodation Ledger rows are operational memos with no GL impact.
fields.label: Enable GL Entry Posting
Auto-create Facility Asset Movement on Transfer

fields.description: Document type to generate when creating rent payments from Accommodation Lease.
fields.label: Default Payment Method
fields.options:
Payment Entry
Payment Order
Expense Request Afmco

fields.description: When ON, expiry/overdue scheduler jobs post a timeline comment on the source document (and any configured Notification emails fire). When OFF, jobs run silently.
fields.label: Enable Operational Notifications
Notification Channel
fields.options:
In-App Only
Email
In-App and Email

fields.description: Days before a Building License expiry date to flag it Expiring Soon (per-license renewal_lead_days still overrides).
fields.label: License Expiry Lead Days

fields.description: Days before a building lease end date to flag it on the watchlist.
fields.label: Lease Expiry Lead Days

fields.description: Days before a temporary stay's expected check-out date to flag it on the supervisor's watchlist.
fields.label: Temporary Stay Lead Days

fields.description: Apply an operational markup to external-supplier accommodation costs in the Supplier Cost Recovery report.
fields.label: Enable Supplier Markup

fields.description: Send a memo-only notification to Finance when a Material Transfer moves stock between buildings on different cost centers. No GL Entry is posted.
fields.label: Notify Finance on Cross-Cost-Center Transfer

fields.description: Recipient address for the cross-cost-center transfer memo. Falls back to the Finance Manager role if left blank.
fields.label: Finance Notification Email
